name: GetBalanceReport
description: Generate a financial report for a balance over a specific time period. The report shows opening balance, movements (incoming and outgoing funds), and closing balance. Can be grouped by transaction categories or status balances. Useful for accounting, reconciliation, and financial analysis.

balance_id.description: The ID of the balance to generate a report for (e.g., 'bal_abc123').

from_.description: Start date for the report period in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g., '2025-01-01').

until.description: End date for the report period in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g., '2025-01-31').

grouping.description: Optional grouping method: 'transaction-categories' groups by payment types, 'status-balances' groups by payment status. Omit for ungrouped totals.
